claim: Plant illustration properties (use class: toxic/food/medicinal; geographic origin: Mediterranean vs non-Mediterranean; plant family) do NOT correlate with measurable text properties (mean word length, glyph entropy, q-initial rate, gallows-initial-line rate, top vowel-pattern frequency, _.oii fire rate) on the same folio. Across 24 tests (4 botanical axes x 6 text features, n=117 plant folios), ZERO reach p<=0.05. The Perun visual-key hypothesis is not supported at this resolution.
evidence_for: Toxic vs food (n=15 vs 19): all 6 features p>0.20
Med vs non-Med (n=12 vs 7): all 6 features p>0.20, closest t=-1.59
Family ANOVA across 5 families (asteraceae 19, lamiaceae 10, ranunculaceae 8, apiaceae 4, brassicaceae 4): all features F<2.5 (max 1.71)
_.oii rate medicinal vs non-medicinal: 0.35% vs 0.41%, t=-0.31
Consistent with volvelle hypothesis (H-BV-VOLVELLE-01): mechanical text generation would not encode sub-folio botanical structure
evidence_against: Toxic-plant _.oii rate (0.81%) is 2.1x medicinal (0.35%) and food (0.38%); untested formally due to small n=15
Sample sizes are modest (7-19 per group in most tests); larger dataset could reveal effects
Only 6 text features tested - richer feature sets (glyph bigrams, line-position interactions, specific vowel patterns beyond _.oii) might correlate
Botanical categorisation is heuristic (Sherwood notes text-match) not clean expert labels
Does NOT contradict H-BV-PLANT-01: _.oii distinguishes plant-folio vs non-plant-herbal at 4.84x; the Perun null tests within-plant subclass signal, which is a different question
test: Targeted test: toxic vs non-toxic _.oii rate, using all plant folios (15 toxic vs ~100 non-toxic). Formal one-tailed t-test.
test_threshold: If toxic _.oii rate stays >=2x non-toxic at p<0.05: narrow counter-signal worth pursuing. If collapses: null holds.

tests_run.details: 24 tests across use class, origin, family, medicinal flag x 6 text features. Zero reach p<=0.05. Toxic _.oii elevation flagged but not formally tested.

tests_remaining: Richer text-feature set (glyph bigrams, specific vowel patterns beyond _.oii)
Replicate with expert botanical labels if available
reasoning: Direct null result on the hypothesis that illustrations constrain the text. Strengthens the volvelle interpretation: if a mechanical process generated the text, sub-folio image properties should NOT leak through. The one dangling signal (toxic _.oii at 2x) deserves a targeted follow-up rather than being buried in a battery.
